title: Spicy Syrian Pilaf with Chwinamul
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired pilaf dish incorporating spicy Syrian flavors and nutritious Chwinamul. Serve as a side or light meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and ginger; sauté for 1 minute.
Add Thai red chili; sauté for another minute.
Add chopped Chwinamul and cook until slightly tender.
Add fermented soy sauce, salt, and black pepper; stir to combine.
Add Syrian pilaf and chopped tomatoes; stir to combine.
Cook for 5-7 minutes or until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped herbs if desired.
